name: The Magma Flow
description: The passage opens onto a broad ledge above a slow river of molten rock, its surface a shifting crust of grey and gold that splits to bleed searing orange light. Heat rolls up in suffocating waves, and slabs of fallen stone form a precarious path across the flow. The roar of the magma is a constant, subterranean growl felt as much as heard.
ambient_messages: A bubble swells and bursts on the surface of the magma, flinging a spray of sparks into the dark.
The molten river shifts its course with a grinding roar, and the heat surges to a blistering peak.
A distant howl rolls up the flow, doubled and redoubled by the stone until it sounds like a whole pack at once.
